Off Calendar Apr-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ORD & NORMAN, A CA. PARTNERSHIP'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Damon M. Thurston of the Law Offices of Rankin Sproat Mires Beaty & Reynolds (510.465.3922) for plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.
At counsel's request, due to the bankruptcy of one, and the death of another defendant, the court modified its ruling as follows: granted as to defendant Balboa Thread Works, Inc. only. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
